title: Tree Production Innovation Fund: funded projects
body: "Projects are being delivered by organisations including universities, specialist manufacturers, charities and cooperatives, all working to increase the efficiency, sustainability and resilience of UK tree production.  They include using 3D X-ray technology to optimise seed quality, exploring rapid breeding techniques for conifers, and developing automated tree grading systems using artificial intelligence.  Find out more about the successful Tree Production Innovation Fund projects for 2025. "
